title: Create: Automotives
description: Adds drivable, steam-powered planes and cars to Create!
body: (so far)   Boilerbox controls: Biplane controls:                                   Reader Section: *** Create: Automotives Create: Automotives adds fictional, steam-powered vehicles designed to fit the Create mod’s style and progression. Features: - One drivable ground vehicle - One flyable airplane - Upgrade system (choose purpose-focused modules) - Create-style integration (recipes + progression) - Extensive sounds/particles and interactable elements Getting Started: 1. Get a mechanical crafter up to craft the Boilerbox / Biplane 2. If needed, craft upgrades with the mechanical crafter 3. Place the Boilerbox / Biplane, fuel its left hand side main tank with lava buckets 4. Place Upgrades with RMB on the green boxes 5. RMB the seat, then either RMB the left-hand fuel valve once, than hold it until the burner runs 6. Alternatively, you can pull up the panel with U and hold the valve. 7. Driving the boilerbox happens with WASD. Use Space to activate boosters. C to honk the steam whistle. N for handbrake. R/F to shift up and down if you have automatic shifting disabled in config. 8. Flying the Biplane is done by pitching (W/S), Rolling (A/D) and Yawing (J/L) the plane. Throttle is controlled with (i/K) Extra: Weapons are switched with the [V] key and fired with [Space] How to remove upgrades? - Use the ratcher item and LMB on the upgrade! How to pick up vehicles? - Use the ratcher item and shift+LMB on the vehicle!
